## Summary

<!-- Brief description of what this PR does -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Style/refactor (`style:` / `refactor:`)
- [ ] CI/CD (`ci:`)
- [ ] Chore (`chore:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Bilingual: all new user-facing strings have `data-es` and `data-en`
- [ ] Accessibility: new interactive elements have `aria-label` and keyboard support
- [ ] Reduced motion: new animations are gated behind `prefers-reduced-motion`
- [ ] Design system: visual changes are reflected in `DESIGN.md` and pass `npx @google/design.md lint DESIGN.md`
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
